name: Maple Gold Mines Ltd.
summary: Maple Gold Mines Ltd. operates as a gold exploration company in Canada. The company through a joint venture agreement with Agnico Eagle Mines Limited holds 50% interest in the Douay gold project with 669 mineral claims covering an area of approximately 357 square kilometers located in the Casa Berardi deformation zone in the Abitibi Greenstone Belt of northern Quebec; and the Joutel project covering an area of approximately 39 square kilometers located in Quebec, Canada. The company was formerly known as Aurvista Gold Corporation and changed its name to Maple Gold Mines Ltd. in November 2017. Maple Gold Mines Ltd. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
